title: VillagerTradeReset
description: A simple and lightweight plugin to reset Villager trades by sneaking and right-clicking.
body:
# VillagerTradeReset

[![GitHub](https://img.shields.io/badge/GitHub-Source_Code-181717?style=for-the-badge&logo=github)](https://github.com/Josuedrxx/VillagerTradeReset)

## About the Plugin
**VillagerTradeReset** is a lightweight and efficient plugin designed to improve the villager trading experience.

![Demostration](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/2G0dafBL/images/1c6ab6094c5bb2bbab09c0870c1a363b4fed103a.gif)

With this plugin, you no longer need to wait for trading cooldowns or waste time. Now, simply **sneak** and **right-click** on a villager to reset their trades instantly.

---

### Features
* **Instant Reset:** Reset villager trades with a simple action.
* **Lightweight:** No performance impact on your server.
* **Compatibility:** Developed for Minecraft 1.20.5 and above (Requires Java 21).

### How to Use
1. Approach a villager.
2. Hold your **sneak** (shift) key.
3. **Right-click** on the villager.
4. **Command:** Use the command `/resettrades` while looking at a villager to perform the same action.
5. Done! The trades will be reset.

### Administrative Command
* `/vtr on|off|reload` : Administrative command to manage the plugin status and reload configs.

### Permissions
* `villagertradereset` : Allows players to use the /resettrades command and the sneak+right-click mechanic.
* `villagertradereset.admin` : Allows administrators to use the /vtr command.

---

## 📦 Dependencies (Optional)

This project is optionally dependent on **[Visible Traders](https://modrinth.com/plugin/visible-traders)** for a better trading visualization.
